initiatives.name: Denton Left
initiatives.description: Denton based organization seeking to bring all socialists, communists, and anarchists into a single force.

initiatives.name: Denton for Diversity
initiatives.description: Spreading symbols of anti-racism and solidarity against white supremacy in Denton, TX.

initiatives.name: Denton Free Fridge
initiatives.description: Upcoming planned free fridge in Denton.

initiatives.name: Free Palestine Denton
initiatives.description: Denton community members for the liberation of Palestine!

initiatives.name: Cooperation Denton
initiatives.description: Municipalist org in Denton, Tx, building towards dual power via decentralization, social ecology, solidarity economy & intersectional feminism.

initiatives.name: Denton Bail Fund
initiatives.description: The Denton Bail Fund is an all-volunteer collective of folks who believe that no one should be incarcerated simply because they cannot afford bail.
